blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 8,484 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
